dialogues.they_es: No tengo un lugar donde quedarme.
dialogues.they_en: I don't have a place to stay.
dialogues.you_es: Voy a conectarle con un albergue cerca de aquí.
dialogues.you_en: I'll connect you with a shelter nearby.

dialogues.they_en: Will I have insurance after discharge?
dialogues.you_es: Vamos a solicitar Medicaid para usted.
dialogues.you_en: We're going to apply for Medicaid for you.

dialogues.they_en: Who can take care of me at home?
dialogues.you_en: Do you have family or friends available?

dialogues.they_es: Mi familia no puede ayudar ahora.
dialogues.they_en: My family can't help right now.
dialogues.you_es: Podemos arreglar cuidado en el hogar.
dialogues.you_en: We can arrange home care for you.

dialogues.you_es: Sí, hay programas de asistencia farmacéutica.
dialogues.you_en: Yes, there are pharmacy assistance programs.

dialogues.they_en: I need help with medical transportation.
dialogues.you_es: Podemos coordinar un servicio de transporte.
dialogues.you_en: We can coordinate a transportation service.

dialogues.you_es: Sí, voy a darle una lista de recursos.
dialogues.you_en: Yes, I'll give you a list of resources.

dialogues.they_en: How do I get food stamps?
dialogues.you_es: Puedo ayudarle a solicitar SNAP hoy.
dialogues.you_en: I can help you apply for SNAP today.
